name: SetControlForeColor
title: SetControlForeColor
syntax: void SetControlForeColor(char[] panel, char[] control, long color);
description: Sets the foreground color of panel elements.
The panel is accessed by its individual panel name that is entered in the Panel Designer/Panel Editor.

parameters.name: panel
parameters.description: Panel name, restricted to 128 characters."" – references all loaded panelsIf you open a panel the first time, the panel is loaded. If you close the panel, it remains loaded.
